com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces

Interface IReader

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IUhfBle, IUhfReader
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx

    public interface IReader
    R2、R5、R6 蓝牙和USB读写器 有些客户只需要我们R6的背夹，不需要uhf模块，所以将R6背夹接口独立出来

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static char UPDATE_STM32

      Acquire battery capacity

      扫描条码
      Scan barcode

      扫描条码

      void setKeyEventCallback(KeyEventCallback KeyEventCallback)
      设置扫描按键回调
      Setup SCAN button call back

    • Method Detail

      • getSTM32Version

        java.lang.String getSTM32Version()
        获取stm32版本号(Acquire stm32 version )
        Returns:
        返回stm32版本 (return stm32 version)

      • getBattery

        int getBattery()
        获取电池电量
        Acquire battery capacity
        Returns:
        返回电量，-1表示获取电量失败(return battery capacity, -1 means acquire failure.)

      • scanBarcode

        java.lang.String scanBarcode()
        扫描条码
        Scan barcode
        Returns:
        返回条码字符串数据(return barcode string data)

      • scanBarcodeToBytes

        byte[] scanBarcodeToBytes()
        扫描条码
        Scan barcode
        Returns:
        返回条码的原始byte数据(return initial byte data of barcode)

      • setKeyEventCallback

        void setKeyEventCallback(KeyEventCallback KeyEventCallback)
        设置扫描按键回调
        Setup SCAN button call back
        Parameters:
        KeyEventCallback - 按键回调接口(Keyboard call back)
